summary: Monty Roberts story on wild Mustang hooves staying sound barefoot, used to argue against metal shoes and trimming in favor of natural barefoot hoof care.
Cavallo recaps attending the SPOGA Horse trade show in Cologne, Germany, meeting worldwide distributors who carry Cavallo Hoof Boots across 28 countries.
Customer testimonial from Sandy in Flagstaff AZ whose 25-year-old gelding regained trail comfort using Cavallo Simple Boots after a lifetime in shoes.
Behind-the-scenes piece on Cavallo's SPOGA presence in Cologne and the Roberts Creek, BC headquarters team handling orders and customer support.
Announcement of Cavallo founder's three barefoot hoof-care presentations at The Mane Event in Chilliwack, British Columbia, with the event schedule.
Recap of Cavallo at the 2017 Mane Event in Chilliwack BC, launching a new clothing line and meeting barefoot advocates, vets and horse-rescue supporters.
Educational post arguing winter is the time to pull metal shoes and go barefoot to restore hoof mechanism and deter conditions like navicular and laminitis.
Invitation to visit Cavallo's booth (with partner Valley Vet Supply) at Equine Affaire in West Springfield, Massachusetts, to get fitted for hoof boots.
Cavallo's sponsorship of and attendance at the PATH International 2017 Conference, highlighting equine-assisted therapy and the brand's support of PATH.
Cavallo's sponsorship of and attendance at the PATH International 2017 Conference on equine-assisted therapy, with staffer Jenny Mundell attending.
Customer testimonial from Dorrine Norby in Iowa on four years of trail riding across rugged terrain with Cavallo Hoof Boots that stay on and last.
Cavallo founder's reflections on her friendships with horsewomen Barbra Schulte and Julie Goodnight in connection with the Equine Affaire show.
